reviews.text: The staff is very nice, the place is cool, I overall liked the experience. My only issue unfortunately was the fact that there was no one after us waiting to take pictures, but we felt rushed by the lady taking the picture. She didn't took her time to let us be creative, she just told us what to do and didn't even gave us a chance to actually smile when she told us to "smile". I felt so rushed during that moment I didn't even had time to tell her to give me a minute to do what I was told. Kinda of a bummer because I don't like giving reviews under 4 or 5 stars. Moral of the story, if you are going to charge almost a 100 dollars for a picture, don't rush it.

The woman who helped us was extremely nice even though she was very busy.
It is awesome that the business has been I. The family for so long and that she had made some of the costumes herself.
Our photos came out great. She even helped us take photos of our dog and it was adorable. She obvious knew what she was doing.
I would have like more time and options to take the photos though.
I felt fairly rushed.
I also think the digital copies were over priced.
Printed pricing were reasonable though.

I have been wanting to do this for at least a decade and Real West did not disappoint. Holly and Joanne make a grand team and have a great eye for what looks good. We had so much fun and I will treasure the portrait we came out with forever!
We love this place. My family has been going here since a was a kid and now I take my kids here. Friendly staff and cute memories.

my friends and i were in a week ago, and unfortunately i discovered this place gave me CHIGGER bites from probably the feather boas. i have massive welts around my arms and wrists almost exactly where to boa was photographed on me. after researching and being in intense pain for a week with no other possible source i’ve come to the conclusion it had to be from here. i’ll be contacting the business further & health department.
